## Boundary Check

- [ ] This change stays within the repository responsibility.
- [ ] Cross-repository contracts are unchanged, or the architecture docs/ADR were updated first.
- [ ] Architecture assumptions, deployment topology, trust boundaries, and data contracts are unchanged, or `computing-infra/TTFHW` was updated.
- [ ] Implementation behavior and architecture documents are consistent.
- [ ] Generated artifacts are not committed unless explicitly intended.
